74951.subject: GPT debunked Mythos hype
74951.body:
----------
######                  [Collaborate with us](https://6hhfxazcbpc.typeform.com/to/uXIl0IFH?utm_source=atlas&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=general_2026_05_11&utm_content=banner_post)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8776fa6e-e2d0-4aec-9648-1bed6de3a659/GenAI_Daily_Banner.jpg?t=1778687445)
Caption: 


----------

----------
**Welcome back!** OpenAI launched a cyber model that does exactly what Anthropic's Mythos was locked up for, and nobody moved to ban it. Google put $75 million into AI filmmaking and the artiest studio in film is making movies with AI now. Plus Trump's quantum order and 11 ways to stop hitting your Claude limit. 



**In today's Generative AI Newsletter:**

* **Cyber:** Why does OpenAI get to ship what Anthropic was banned for?

* **Hollywood:** Why is the movie star suddenly optional?

* **Quantum:** What's behind Trump's 2028 deadline?

* **Claude:** How do you stop running out of Claude?


----------

----------
## [GPT debunked Mythos hype](https://x.com/sama/status/2069121360744550796)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/06f124b2-37a2-4ff9-abcf-6a5b269fa421/Beehiiv_01_-_Jun_23.png?t=1782206718)
Caption: 

OpenAI shipped the full version of GPT-5.5-Cyber last night, a model built to hunt down software vulnerabilities and patch them, which Altman says posts state-of-the-art numbers on the CyberGym benchmark. 

That is the exact capability Anthropic locked Mythos away for and got Fable 5 banned over.

Anthropic's pitch was that the capability was too dangerous to release. Researchers had already said it was nothing special, since the same vulnerability-hunting runs in GPT-5.5, Claude Opus and other models. 

OpenAI gates its cyber model to vetted defenders, the same way Anthropic gated Mythos, but OpenAI's never drew a ban.

So why did one lab get banned and not the other? 

First of all, it's not even a public release yet. And OpenAI is Washington's favorite child. 

They hired a co-author of Trump's AI plan last week, while Anthropic spent the month fighting the same White House. 

One lab is on Washington's good side, and it ships the same kind of model with none of the consequences.


----------



----------
_Special highlight from our network_

## [Most businesses are experimenting with AI. The smartest ones are rebuilding around it.](https://link.genai.works/Bxca)

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6c73f94d-f9e0-41c1-b666-ec1b40ff82e8/image.png?t=1782206454)
Follow image link: (https://link.genai.works/Bxca)
Caption: 

Bolting AI onto an existing workflow gets you a few wins. Redesigning the workflow around AI changes the economics. The gap bet

74950.subject: Santander just open-sourced its AI governance stack. No other major bank or FinTech has 🤖🏦; Wall Street banks ar…
74950.body:
View this post on the web at https://linas.substack.com/p/fintechpulse1092

Hey Everyone,
Good morning & happy Tuesday! Today we’re diving into banking giant Banco Santander, which just became the first major global bank to open-source its entire AI governance stack (what SantanderAI is all about, why it matters, and what it means for every other bank & FinTech using AI + bonus deep dives into Revolut’s AI for Money [ https://substack.com/redirect/f0a1aee6-8528-44c5-b3e2-c51aefd32fcd?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], how to build an AI Agent from scratch [ https://substack.com/redirect/ac299452-9088-45b5-b80a-33545cbc2b74?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and the AI Finance Playbook [ https://substack.com/redirect/38d5e511-10e2-41f2-93ee-b13efe5c7685?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside), and how Wall Street banks are now effectively American’s AI border guards (why JPMorgan & Goldman Sachs pulled Claude models from its employees’ toolkits & what does this indicate about the future AI deployments + bonus deep dives into GLM-5.2, the strongest open AI model today & how to run it on your local computer [ https://substack.com/redirect/7660bfab-18b6-40b3-a51d-78bc251eef95?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ], and how to Unlock Claude Fable 5 Lite on Opus 4.8 [ https://substack.com/redirect/3cef5ea1-59e9-4e97-949b-42639c24a041?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] inside). So let’s just jump straight into the finnovative stuff 🌶️
Santander just open-sourced its AI governance stack. No other major bank has 🤖🏦
Following the trends 🤖 Every bank in the world is racing to deploy AI. Santander just gave away the brakes.
On June 21, Spanish banking giant Banco Santander became the first major global bank to open-source its entire AI governance and safety infrastructure.
Fourteen repositories on GitHub, all under Apache 2.0.
→ Guardrail optimization, mechanical decision enforcement, fairness testing, synthetic fraud graph generation.
→ The full code, free for any competitor, fintech, or regulator to fork.
Not JPMorgan. Not Goldman. Not HSBC. No peer has made a comparable release.
Santander came in first and set the precedent.
Let’s take a closer look at this, break down each repo, the strategic calculus behind handing competitors your compliance playbook, and what SantanderAI means for every institution deploying AI under the EU AI Act...

Unsubscribe https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9saW5hcy5zdWJzdGFjay5jb20vYWN0aW9uL2Rpc2FibGVfZW1haWw_

74938.subject: Immediate Action Required on 878341164164
74938.body:
We have detected potentially compromised Service Account credentials  
associated with your Google Cloud Platform account.




Google Cloud Platform



MY CONSOLE




Notification Suspicious Activity Alert



Potentially compromised credentials for Google Cloud Platform/API project  
My Roport (id: my-roport)



Dear Customer,


We detected a publicly exposed secret for the following OAuth client  
associated with project 878341164164:

Secret for client  
878341164164-mm5q8t2kuk26dj44prkjvl1k27q15026.apps.googleusercontent.com  
found at the following URL:  
https://github.com/NovosadovO/morning-report/blob/a761cad4108b33fcd795b1c249c311e789827fd1/monitor.py

To prevent potential security and abuse risks, you must take action in  
accordance with our OAuth 2.0 Policies guidance to “handle client  
credentials securely”. Your client secret may have been inadvertently  
published in public sources or websites (for instance, the credentials were  
mistakenly uploaded to a code repository). Please note that as the  
project/account owner, you are responsible for securing your client  
credentials.



Immediate action is required to generate a new secret to continue using  
OAuth. We strongly recommend that you take the following steps:


Log in to the Google Cloud Console.
Generate a new client secret following these instructions.
Update any applications or websites to use the new client secret
Take immediate steps to ensure that your client secrets are not embedded in  
public source code systems, stored in download directories, or  
unintentionally shared in other ways.

Thank you for ensuring that your Google OAuth clients are secure. Together  
we can make sure that you and your users are safe.

Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Team




GO TO MY CONSOLE




Sincerely,

Google Cloud Platform Trust & Safety




Google

© 2016 Google Inc. 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform or your account.

74933.subject: Objednávka OFV34023
74933.body: Dobrý deň pán/pani Oleh Novosadov Ďakujeme Vám za objednávku OFV. Rekapitulácia Vašej objednávky: Kurzy OFV: KAPITÁLOVÝ TRH - stredný stupeň (OFV) (1 rok) Meno: Oleh Novosadov Adresa trvalého bydliska: Trieda SNP 83 04011 Košice Fak. adresa: Trieda SNP 83 04011 Košice Slovenská republika Email: novosadovoleg@gmail.com Poznámka: POZOR DÔLEŽITÁ INFORMÁCIA ! Ďakujeme Vám za zaslanie objednávky kurzov OFV. Objednávka bola prijatá na spracovanie. Po spracovaní prihlášky Vám e-mailom pošleme zálohovú faktúru. Po úhrade FA Vám pošleme prístup do aplikácie na vzdelávanie. Ak ste na úhradu OFV použili platobnú bránu, prosím počkajte na ďalšie emaily. SBA EDUCA email: podpora@sbaeduca.sk web: www.sbaeduca.sk

>>>>>>>>>>

>>>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret
